sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n23879" key="deka/shmos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">δεκά-σημος</orth> <pron extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="pron">[κᾰ]</pron>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n23879.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">of ten time-units</tr_> in Music, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg2054.tlg001:1:14" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Aristid.Quint.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">1.14</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
